title: Chilled Crunchy Turkish Butter Bread
description: A low-carb friendly Turkish bread dish featuring chilled butter and a crunchy crust. Perfect for a quick brunch or snack.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and salt in a bowl.
Add sugar and warm water to the bowl and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
Divide the dough into 2 equal pieces and shape each piece into a log.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
Fry the dough logs for 2-3 minutes on each side until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fried bread on paper towels and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Mix chilled butter with a fork until it becomes light and fluffy.
Place the fried bread on a serving plate and spread the butter on top of each bread piece.
